records.question: Which projects named A Puzzling Parallax have assigned team members?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT projects.code FROM projects
JOIN assignedto ON projects.code = assignedto.project
WHERE projects.name = 'A Puzzling Parallax'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Code FROM Projects AS T1 INNER JOIN AssignedTo AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Project WHERE T1.Name = 'A Puzzling Parallax'

records.question: Which projects named Winds: Studying Bernoullis Principle involve Michael Rogers and require at most 156 hours?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT projects.code FROM projects
JOIN assignedto ON projects.code = assignedto.project
JOIN scientists ON assignedto.scientist = scientists.ssn
WHERE scientists.name = 'Michael Rogers' AND projects.hours <= 156 AND projects.name = 'Winds: Studying Bernoullis Principle'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Code FROM Projects AS T1 INNER JOIN AssignedTo AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Project INNER JOIN Scientists AS T3 ON T2.Scientist = T3.SSN WHERE T1.Name = 'Winds: Studying Bernoullis Principle' AND T3.Name = 'Michael Rogers' AND T1.Hours <= 156

records.question: Which projects require exactly 789 hours and involve the scientist where name is George ODonnell?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT projects.code FROM projects
JOIN assignedto ON projects.code = assignedto.project
JOIN scientists ON assignedto.scientist = scientists.ssn
WHERE projects.hours = 789 AND scientists.name = 'George ODonnell'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Code FROM Projects AS T1 INNER JOIN AssignedTo AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Project INNER JOIN Scientists AS T3 ON T2.Scientist = T3.SSN WHERE T1.Hours = 789 AND T3.Name = 'George ODonnell'

records.question: Which projects named Juicy: Extracting Apple Juice with Pectinase, assigned to Mary-Anne Foster, require at most 321 hours?

records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Code FROM Projects AS T1 INNER JOIN AssignedTo AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Project INNER JOIN Scientists AS T3 ON T2.Scientist = T3.SSN WHERE T1.Name = 'Juicy: Extracting Apple Juice with Pectinase' AND T3.Name = 'Mary-Anne Foster' AND T1.Hours <= 321

records.question: Which projects with at least 545 hours have team members assigned to them?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT projects.code FROM projects
JOIN assignedto ON projects.code = assignedto.project
WHERE projects.hours >= 545
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Code FROM Projects AS T1 INNER JOIN AssignedTo AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Project WHERE T1.Hours >= 545
